summary:
The provided evidence neither mentions nor addresses lamina-associated domains (LADs) nor links them to transcriptional activation. Based purely on the content presented—focused on obstetrics and hormone-driven labor—the assertion that LADs are tied to transcriptional activation has no supporting foundation within the material.  

Thus, according to the specific constraints of evaluating against the given evidence alone, it follows logically that they are not associated with transcriptional activation under these circumstances.
